name: property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of lease payments and bank transactions.
problem_solved: Inaccurate financial records due to untracked lease payments.
features: manual entry of lease payment records

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate financial records due to untracked lease payments.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of lease payments and bank transactions
must_have_features: manual entry of lease payment records
